issues.detail: The skill assumes Node.js or Python environment, limiting cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: node-express-audit
scenarios.rationale: Baseline ran npm audit and grepped broadly but printed secrets in full and skipped OWASP categorization; treatment ran npm audit --json, used the documented grep with --exclude-dir, grouped findings as Critical/High/Medium/Low with OWASP codes, and masked secrets to first 8 chars.

scenarios.name: django-secrets-deps
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used pip-audit and flagged SECRET_KEY but only said to remove it from code; treatment ran pip-audit --format=json, advised rotating the key and any committed .env, and recommended adding .env to .gitignore plus a gitleaks pre-commit hook.
